label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Eve ends up at the end of the match. So, we have five players: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. They start in specific positions and then swap several times. I need to track each swap step by step to see where Eve is after all the swaps. First, let me list their initial positions: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So Dave was Left Winger, and Eve was Goalkeeper. After swapping, Dave becomes Goalkeeper and Eve becomes Left Winger. Let me note that: After first swap: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Center Midfielder - Claire: Right Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. Claire was Right Midfielder, Bob was Center Midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Alice was Fullback, Bob is now Right Midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Goalkeeper - Eve: Left Winger Fourth swap: Eve and Dave trade positions. Eve was Left Winger, Dave was Goalkeeper. After swapping: - Alice: Right Midfielder - Bob: Fullback - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper Fifth swap: Bob and Alice trade positions. Bob is Fullback, Alice is Right Midfielder. After swapping: - Alice: Fullback - Bob: Right Midfielder - Claire: Center Midfielder - Dave: Left Winger - Eve: Goalkeeper So, after all these swaps, Eve is back to being Goalkeeper? Wait, let me check again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First swap: Dave and Eve swap. So Eve is now Left Winger. Second swap: Claire and Bob. No effect on Eve. Third swap: Alice and Bob. No effect on Eve. Fourth swap: Eve and Dave swap again. So Eve goes back from Left Winger to Goalkeeper, and Dave goes back to Left Winger. Fifth swap: Bob and Alice swap, still no effect on Eve. So Eve is back to Goalkeeper. But let me check again step by step, maybe I messed up the order. Let me try tracking each player's position through each swap. Initial positions: Alice: Fullback Bob: Center Midfielder Claire: Right Midfielder Dave: Left Winger Eve: Goalkeeper After first swap: Dave and Eve swap. Alice: Fullback Bob: Center Midfielder Claire: Right Midfielder Dave: Goalkeeper Eve: Left Winger After second swap: Claire and Bob swap. Alice: Fullback Bob: Right Midfielder Claire: Center Midfielder Dave: Goalkeeper Eve: Left Winger After third swap: Alice and Bob swap. Alice: Right Midfielder Bob: Fullback Claire: Center Midfielder Dave: Goalkeeper Eve: Left Winger After fourth swap: Eve and Dave swap. Alice: Right Midfielder Bob: Fullback Claire: Center Midfielder Dave: Left Winger Eve: Goalkeeper After fifth swap: Bob and Alice swap.
